function arrayFilter(array, predicate) {
  var index = -1,
      length = array == null ? 0 : array.length,
      resIndex = 0,
      result = [];

  while (++index < length) {
    var value = array[index];
    if (predicate(value, index, array)) {

  return result;
}

module.exports = arrayFilter;
